programme.desc: A young woman falls in love while her boyfriend is in a coma.

programme.title: Resbak
programme.desc: A father with a dark and checkered past is forced to return to his violent ways to save his wayward son's life.

programme.title: Lover's Delight
programme.desc: Florence and Age, two unorthodox private detectives, always manage to make a mess of every case that comes their way.

programme.title: Haba-baba-doo! Puti-puti-poo!
programme.desc: Domeng and Mokong, two unemployed men, find work as maids at a house with seven children who create chaos in their midst.

programme.title: Weder-Weder Lang Yan
programme.desc: The rich Don Emilio leads a lavish lifestyle, making his two brothers jealous. However, when he goes bankrupt, he decides to stay with his brothers to see who cares for him.

programme.title: Ika-11 Utos: Mahalin Mo, Asawa Mo
Sgt. Gabo Boga
programme.desc: Gabo, following in his father's footsteps, decides to eradicate senseless crimes from society. Things take a turn when Honey Boy vows to stop him.

programme.title: Hey Babe!
programme.desc: A washed-up vaudevillian (Buddy Hackett) befriends a 12-year-old orphan (Yasmine Bleeth) who wants to go into show business.

programme.title: First Day High
programme.desc: When a college basketball team's water bottles are poisoned, the investigation centers on five freshmen, who come to learn more than they ever imagined about life, love and themselves.

programme.title: La Vida Rosa
programme.desc: Rosa and Dado are con artists, but are involved in different criminal activities.

programme.title: Ika-11 Utos: Mahalin Mo, Asawa Mo
She's the One
programme.desc: Alex, a fun-loving parking valet who uses customer's cars and writes poetry to impress the ladies, gets caught up between two women.

programme.title: Give Me Five
programme.desc: Xiao Wu returns to his former home to retrieve the memory of his father suffering from Alzheimer's disease, but his plan is disrupted by an accident.

programme.title: Amanos: Patas ang Laban
programme.desc: Lando and Bobby are victims of an illegal recruiter, Celso. To get revenge, they take his only child as a hostage.

programme.title: Makiusap ka sa Diyos
programme.desc: A nun is ostracized by her superiors after a brutal encounter with a rapist leaves her pregnant.

programme.title: Home Along da Riles 2
programme.desc: Kevin, who struggles to raise his four children due to financial problems, suddenly becomes a millionaire. Then, he moves into a bigger house, which leads to hilarious situations.

programme.title: Milyonaryong Mini
programme.desc: Berting, a carefree playboy, believes that all the people in his life are after his money. Because of his attitude, Berting's father decides to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: How to Be Yours
programme.desc: A cook and a sales agent meet on the Chinese New Year and start falling in love.

programme.title: Batas Ang Katapat Mo
programme.desc: A police officer investigating the notorious leader of a crime syndicate crosses paths with a girl, and she gets drawn into his combat against numerous criminals.

programme.title: Mano Po 2: My Home
programme.desc: Half-sisters Sol, LuShui and Belinda come into conflict and deal with years of inner turmoil and resentment after their father is murdered.

programme.desc: Toryo cannot seem to avoid trouble and has been in and out of prison more times than he can remember.

programme.desc: Follow Madeline Matlock as she rejoins the work force at a prestigious law firm, where she uses her wily tactics to win cases and expose wrongdoing.

Or will the demanding visionary help bring their restaurant the win?

programme.desc: Based on PD Eastman's classic children’s book, Go, Dog. Go! With her ingenuity and creativity, Tag can go as far as any plan will take her, always with her best friend, Scooch Pooch, by her side. Scooch’s easy-going nature is the perfect counterbalance to Tag’s high-octane energy. But as much as Tag loves to go, she’s often reminded that it's family, friends and neighbors that really fuel a community.

programme.desc: "Demon Chef" Alvin Leung and his students are travelling to different countries to explore various local Chinese cuisines.

programme.title: Yumi's Cells
programme.desc: Adapted from the popular webtoon of the same title, it tells the story of an ordinary office worker Yumi through the eyes of her brain cells, which controlled her thoughts, feelings and actions.

programme.title: The Village Barber
programme.desc: Park Bo-gum, who holds a national barber’s license, and his close friends Lee Sang-yi and Kwak Dong-yeon run a special barbershop in a remote rural village, tending to both hair and hearts.

programme.title: Fresh off the Sea
programme.desc: Yum Jung-ah, Ahn Eun-jin, Park Jun-myun, Dex and special guests are visiting seaside villages in Korea. They will live there and cook fresh seasonal dishes using ingredients from the sea.

programme.title: You Can Cook With Sam Kim
programme.desc: Star chef Sam Kim will teach you how to make all kinds of delicious dishes – from Italian pasta, Spanish food to desserts! Follow his easy recipes and enjoy cooking!

programme.title: Walking Through The Village
programme.desc: Actor Gu Bon-seung shows the warmth and purity of life in the village along the river, and presents how new history was made and became one’s memory.

programme.title: Jim Button And Luke The Engine Driver
programme.desc: Jim Knopf and Luke the Engine Driver embark on an adventurous journey through fantastic worlds to free the kidnapped Princess Li Si from the impenetrable Dragon City and solve the secret of Jim's mysterious origins.

programme.title: Legendary Amazons
programme.desc: In early 11th century China, the Song Dynasty is being invaded by armies of the rival state Western Xia. Yang, the last of a long line of Song generals, is killed and his widowed wife Mu leads other widows into battle to save their dynasty.

programme.title: Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard
programme.desc: The bodyguard, Michael Bryce, continues his friendship with assassin, Darius Kincaid, as they try to save Darius' wife Sonia.

programme.title: Night Of The Undead
programme.desc: So Hee married the perfect man but while she looks into the secret of his everlasting stamina, she finds out she's about to be killed by him and joins powers with her friends in order to kill him first.

programme.title: Hide And Seek
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman follows a lead to find his missing brother, he dives headlong into a twisted underworld of squatters and vagrants that threatens to tear apart his family as he struggles to maintain his sanity.

programme.title: Winners And Sinners
programme.desc: Five parolees swear they will reform, while an underworld boss decides to reactivate his counterfeit money business

programme.title: The Bad Guys: Reign Of Chaos
programme.desc: After a group of criminals manage to escape while being transported, the police decided to regroup a special team which consists of prisoners to help track and return them to prison.

programme.title: Fist Of Fury
programme.desc: A young man seeks vengeance for the death of his teacher

programme.title: The Young Master
programme.desc: After failing in a Lion Dance competition, Dragon is sent away from school to find his errant brother.

programme.title: Tully
programme.desc: A struggling mother of three forms an unexpected bond with the night nanny hired to help with her newborn baby.

programme.title: Jaws: The Revenge
programme.desc: In the fourth and final installment of the Jaws franchise, Chief Brody's widow believes that her family is deliberately being targeted by another shark in search of revenge.

programme.title: The Man Standing Next
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Korea is under the absolute control of President Park, who controls the KCIA, the organization with the edge over any branch of government.

programme.title: Woman In Black 2
programme.desc: 40 years after the first haunting at Eel Marsh House, a group of children evacuated from WWII London arrive, awakening the house's darkest inhabitant.

programme.title: Oceans Africa
programme.desc: Often referred to as the dinosaur fish, the coelacanth occupies a unique place in the fossil record, and when it was rediscovered almost a century ago it shook the scientific community. We follow its journey to the present day, accompanying WildOceans' scientists on an expedition to uncover more of their secrets and behaviours.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: From finding a mate in the branches, to adapting to life at height, tree dwelling animals have evolved unique traits to ensure they thrive in this hostile and complex environment.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Using ingenious adaptations, and devious techniques, prey species have evolved incredible tricks to escape from the jaws of death.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Reptiles, amphibians, insects and fish are found in every corner of our world - and for this special group of animals, life is regulated by the sun.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Being just that little bit different, can bring huge advantages, but it also presents almighty challenges. By going against the grain, these animals have found unique ways to stay alive.

programme.title: Evolving Vegan
programme.desc: Mena explores his Canadian backyard, discovering delicious plant-based sushi, pistachio cannolis, and pizza; he gets hands-on at a vegan cheese factory with comedian Bassem Youssef.

programme.title: Evolving Vegan
programme.desc: In a frenzy of mezcal and spice, Mena devours a host of local delicacies: plant-based seafood, agua chile and classic enfrijoladas. Later, Mena joins a local abuela to make traditional moles.

programme.title: Evolving Vegan
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Texas is a vegan oasis; Mena explores the off-beat Texan Capitol's surprising plant-based bounty: fried chicken, larger-than-life biscuits, short rib baos and mouth-watering vegan brisket.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Cher’s Silkwood producer Michael Hausman, Sonny & Cher manager Harvey Kresky, film critic Kirk Honeycutt, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Jim Carrey’s The Mask director Chuck Russell, The Duck Factory co-star Teresa Ganzel, Man On The Moon executive producer Michael Hausman, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Robin Williams’ Dead Poets Society co-star Gale Hansen, Mork & Mindy writer David Misch, friend and comedian Rick Overton, plus many more.

programme.title: Kylie Minogue: Pop Icon
programme.desc: This documentary chronicles the extraordinary life and career of Kylie Minogue, from her early days on the Australian soap opera "Neighbours" to her rise as a global music sensation.

programme.title: Julia Roberts: Pretty Iconic
programme.desc: Discover the extraordinary life of Julia Roberts, Hollywood’s beloved icon. From her breakout role in Pretty Woman to her Oscar-winning performances, this documentary explores her journey, enduring charm, and impact on cinema, capturing the heart of an unforgettable star.

programme.title: Helen Mirren: Queen Of Stage And Screen
programme.desc: This documentary explores Helen Mirren’s fearless career, tracing her journey from a humble upbringing to becoming a global icon. It covers her early successes in the world of theatre as well as her wide range of film and television roles.

programme.title: Cher: Sharing Her Story
programme.desc: Step into the world of Cher, an enduring icon whose journey from humble beginnings to superstardom has shaped pop culture for over five decades. A true pioneer, she’s dominated music charts, reinvented herself in film, and built a legacy that transcends entertainment. Cher’s influence extends beyond the stage, empowering generations with her fearlessness, resilience, and activism.

programme.title: Nicole Kidman: Outback To Oscars
programme.desc: Feature documentary about the early life, filmic career, and trials and tribulations of Australian icon, Nicole Kidman. From a Bush Christmas to Oscar winning performances, her story is one of inspiration and hardship.

programme.title: P!nk: Fearless
programme.desc: Pink is a powerhouse of pop and rock music. Although initially seen as yet another act in the late 90’s crowd of teen pop acts, she has since gone on to define her own genre and solidified her place as a standout from the rest. She is a force to be reckoned with in the music scene.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Robin Williams’ Dead Poets Society co-star Gale Hansen, Mork & Mindy writer David Misch, friend and comedian Rick Overton, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Madonna’s first manager Camille Barbone, dancer Carlton Wilborn, Evita studio executive Lauren Lloyd, plus many more.

programme.title: Neymar: Brazil's Number One
programme.desc: From the streets of Santos to becoming Brazil's number one goal scorer, the 20-year journey of Neymar is one for the history books. Having played football on nearly every continent, Neymar will go down as a legend of the game, forever.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Soar over the richly diverse, African nation of Zambia. Including cities crafted by the world's richest men and markets teeming with some of the world's poorest people.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Art And Design
programme.desc: What is design without art and what is art without design? How about combining the two of them? Explore the world of crafts and convention for the construction and the skeleton behind the beauty and concept of fashion.

programme.title: Kylie Minogue: Pop Icon
programme.desc: This documentary chronicles the extraordinary life and career of Kylie Minogue, from her early days on the Australian soap opera "Neighbours" to her rise as a global music sensation.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Based on PD Eastman's classic children’s book, Go, Dog. Go! Follows 6-year-old dog, Tag Barker, on her hilarious adventures in the city of Pawston, a fun-loving community of dogs on the go. Tag is a skilled mechanic and loves anything that goes. With her ingenuity and creativity, Tag can go as far as any plan will take her, always with her best friend, Scooch Pooch, by her side. Scooch’s easy-going nature is the perfect counterbalance to Tag’s high-octane energy. But as much as Tag loves to go, she’s often reminded that it's family, friends and neighbors that really fuel a community.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch learn that Sandra Paws' sleigh broke down on a mountain, they have to go on an adventure to fix the sleigh and save Sniffs-mas! Meanwhile, Beans tries to get a grumpy Frank to feel the Sniffs-mas spirit.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Marcus makes a Dew Drop-sized hot-air balloon for Phoebe and the Dews have a blast helping their kids from above, including secretly guiding Lola back to her family, before she accidentally follows Hip-Hop the frog out of the park. / Phoebe makes a pair of glasses for Bob the bird, but when seeing things clearly for the first time gets him lost, the Dews help Bob find his nest before his family arrives for a visit.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: The Dews think a double rainbow is making their powers change, but what they discover is that they are about to graduate to a new level of Dew Dropness, with the newfound ability to float in the air! / When Reed discovers he’s being assigned a family, he runs to tell Athena, only to find Athena and her house are missing! programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a recipe for dandelion soup and a soup bowl, she discovers Kitty Fairy is sick! Gabby and Pandy make her some delicious dandelion soup and while she rests, they take care of her Garden. With the help of all the Gabby Cats, they water the Singing Flowers, help the Rainbow Kitty Bushes regain their color, and sing some fussy Itty Bitty Blossoms a lullaby. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a spaceship that takes off with a sleeping CatRat inside! Gabby, Pandy, and Kitty Fairy have to get the ship back into The Fairy Tail Garden before Floyd (who thinks it's the best kitty toy ever!) gets his paws on it!

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: After Womp is told he can't attend the upcoming school ceremony, Thunk makes it his personal mission to get Womp to pass every subject before the ceremony; When the Valleyites disagree with letting the Broods move to Ahhh! Valley, Grug throws a giant party to force them to become best friends

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: With a big meteorite headed straight for Ahhh! Valley, Grug gathers a team to try and stop the rock before it destroys the valley while Ugga takes the rest of the family to go do the one thing they've always wanted to do in Ahhh! Valley before they evacuate

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Missing his old life on his birthday, Boss tries to have a full-fledged grown-up celebration in Chicago, but Carol is the only one able to chauffeur and take care of him. The two battle at every stop of the birthday party tour, but when Boss's old work nemesis sets him up for an Federal Investigation Sting at an improv comedy show, Boss and Carol are forced to work together to escape the law.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss, Tina, JJ, Dez and Pip willfully get babysat by the Uncuddleables, planning to expose them as horrible sitters via secret, hidden cameras. But the plan is thrown for a loop when Tina's first night alone without her parents makes her fall for their sitter Mia as a "substitute mommy." Meanwhile, Nannycam uses the babysitting distraction to sneak into the Uncuddleables' secret garage hideout to gather intel with her own "B field team."

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When they learn the Dragon Hunters are tracking the Flightmare, Hiccup and Astrid race to stop them after Heather spills secrets from Viggo Grimborn

programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, the Melvins create a final exam that George and Harold will be sure to fail: the Doom Dome. To ensure success, Melvinborg injects Melvin's cells with nanobots, giving him heightened powers. But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! The boys enlist Captain Underpants to fight the jealous nerd, but their victory only loses the nanobots onto Piqua...

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

But they need help: Captain Underpants’ brain cells to the rescue! And when it’s all over, George and Harold will finally be able to go to summer camp.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Flea didn't jump. Flea didn't really move at all. She was very big and very round. All Flea wanted to do was to see the world. programme.desc: A Philadelphia police officer, Mickey Fitzpatrick, believes a string of suspected overdoses among sex workers in her district may be homicides and she may have a personal connection. When a red truck seems to be following her, she fears for her and her son’s safety.

programme.title: Four Corners - Episode 5
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Media Watch - Episode 7
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: How Deadly World - Five Dangerous City Animals That You Wouldn't Expect
programme.desc: By 2050, two-thirds of us will live in urban areas - and we won't be alone. Dr Ann Jones reveals the secrets of five dangerous animals that are thriving in our concrete jungles.

programme.title: Grand Designs Transformations - Avalon and Balwyn
programme.desc: In two inspiring transformations, a couple turn a simple pavilion house on Sydney's northern beaches into a stylish pad filled with bespoke marble furniture and, in Melbourne, a family creates a flamboyant forever bathroom.

programme.title: Dream Gardens - Portsea, VIC
programme.desc: A beach loving Aussie family transform their flat building site in Portsea on Victoria's Mornington Peninsula into a modern Australian coastal garden.

programme.title: Iconic Australia - The Centre
programme.desc: The iconic myth of the red centre is seared into the Australian psyche. A space of mystery and truth, this is a story that runs to the heart of Australia's nationhood.

programme.title: Ride
programme.desc: Two world champions fall in love and conquer the world of BMX racing. A single training accident risks taking everything they have known away.

programme.title: Trapeze
programme.desc: A crippled circus acrobat is torn emotionally between two ambitious young trapeze artists, one a talented young American and a less-gifted but beautiful Italian.

programme.title: Out Of Africa
programme.desc: In 20th-century colonial Kenya, a Danish baroness/plantation owner has a passionate love affair with a free-spirited big-game hunter.

programme.title: Stop! Or My Mom Will Shoot
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Estelle Getty star in this action comedy about a detective whose life is turned upside down when his feisty mother witnesses a murder and becomes his unlikely partner.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: The Return Of The Living Dead
programme.desc: When two bumbling employees at a medical supply warehouse accidentally release a deadly gas into the air, the vapors cause the dead to rise again as zombies.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: Jim Carrey and Cameron Diaz star in this story of a sweet, socially inept bank teller who discovers a mask that transforms him into a superhero ... but one whom you may not want to call for help.

programme.title: Armour Of God
programme.desc: Asian Hawk (Jackie Chan) and his bumbling sidekick are sent on a quest through Europe to find a mysterious treasure held by a shadowy organization of monks.

programme.title: Stop! Or My Mom Will Shoot
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Estelle Getty star in this action comedy about a detective whose life is turned upside down when his feisty mother witnesses a murder and becomes his unlikely partner.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Apollo 13 is an inspiring and riveting story of the real-life space flight that gripped a nation and changed the world.

programme.title: CI Asia: Missing In Bali
programme.desc: When 8-year-old Engeline mysteriously disappears, police, the public and a clairvoyant uncover dark secrets as they search for her.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After a deceased baby is found hidden in a cardboard box, investigators question the mother and her estranged husband to figure out who is responsible for this horrific crime.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes, detectives zero in on her controlling estranged husband—whose story continually changes in the interrogation room.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: A deadly church bombing stuns a small Illinois county, sending law enforcement scrambling for answers. Then it happens again.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Lakhvir Singh enjoyed cooking for Lucky Cheema, the man she loved. But when he left her to marry a much younger woman, Singh made the couple a meal that would turn out to be the last Lucky ever tasted.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When 14-year-old Nacole Smith is brutally murdered in 1995 on a wooded path in Atlanta, the police and community rally around her mother as she seeks justice.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S1)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. A man decides to interrupt his crime to make a pizza; police track down a man who jumped through the roof of a port-a-potty; and more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S1)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. A naked man allegedly steals an ATV; a man who apparently was feeding the alligators gets a visit from police; and more.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: Undercover ATF and DEA agents are reminded to never judge a book by its cover and to always be on their toes. Even small-time suspects have the potential to unleash terror.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: An auto parts store owner turns the tables on an armed assailant by taking his gun; an armoured car driver survives a terrifying attack; a hotel clerk flips the script on an armed robber. And more.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A brave grandma fights off two carjackers intent on stealing her truck; a woman stands up against heinous domestic violence; two assailants pull a gun on a store manager who escapes.

programme.title: CI Asia: Top Terrorist
programme.desc: Police hunt for the mastermind of the 2009 Jakarta bombing, but are stunned to find the bombing's signature matches that of a long-dead terrorist.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: January 5, 2016, Baltimore, MD. Police officers respond to a report of a deceased man found at the Deluxe Plaza Motel in Northeast Baltimore.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A 73-year-old murder suspect trashes the interrogation room; a married mother of three admits to a 26-year-old cold case killing; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: Investigators interrogate a prison inmate about an unsolved serial killer case from the 90s; a former police sergeant is questioned about the murder of his mistress; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A convicted felon drops the f-bomb during a virtual hearing; a grieving mother brings her son's ashes to his killer's sentencing; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam: Top Five Accused Killers 3
programme.desc: A look at the top five accused killers on Court Cam.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: A woman in a volatile relationship is found dead in her car. Detectives suspect her boyfriend, but, at trial, he takes the stand to brazenly claim she was actually the victim of a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: A young man who came to the U.S. to fulfil his dreams is killed at a birthday party, and Tulsa police must cut through a web of lies to find the culprit.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: After an argument in his home, a man answers a knock at his front door and is suddenly shot and killed.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: After a former marine is gunned down in broad daylight, Tulsa detectives must track down a family of three. But, at trial, justice hangs on whether the gunman and victim are actually who they appear to be.

programme.desc: A violent assault ends in a fatal stabbing when a young mother kills her boyfriend to defend her child. Considered innocent by police for four years, she was re-arrested and faces up to 41 years in prison.

programme.title: Grade 6 Math
programme.desc: Understand the nature of solid figures, sequences in forming rules, expressions and equations. Learn more about rate and speed, and of area and surface area of plane and solid or space figures.

programme.title: Magarantham - EP 19
programme.desc: Suseela’s mother came to visit her, but Chandru tried to drive her away. He then turned on Suseela with a barrage of verbal abuse. Later, when the couple consulted a doctor about childbirth, it was revealed that Chandru had a medical condition. When Suseela questioned whether he had known about this earlier, his ego was wounded, and in a fit of rage, he began to physically assault her.

programme.title: Theerpugal - EP 8
programme.desc: Theerpugal is a thrilling series that delves into some of the most notorious criminal cases in Singapore that captivated public attention. Each episode dramatizes the crime, meticulously traces the arguments of both the prosecution and the defense and concludes with the judges' verdicts and the reasoning behind them. This series is not only exciting and suspenseful but also highly informative and educational.

He then travels to a former prison in Fremantle, which has now been conserved as a heritage site. He also visits the fun and exciting Fremantle Market, where local produce and art is sold. Kumar meets Anita, an Aboriginal painter who uses art as a way of sharing her history.

programme.title: The Apple of My Eye
programme.desc: Elise is beautiful, funny, and blind. Theo is a seducer but a loser. They love music. But when they meet in the elevator, it's hate at first sight.

programme.title: Running On Sand
programme.desc: When an Eritrean refugee about to be deported from Israel is mistaken for the Nigerian striker just signed to a struggling soccer team, his fate depends on the team’s success in this charming, socially relevant dramedy.

programme.title: Baltic Files I - The Body On The Beach
programme.desc: After being transferred to the German-Danish border, Chief Inspector Svenja is tasked with a case involving a body on a beach. With her new colleague Antione, she investigates a case which involves a liquor dealer and a tragedy that goes back decades.

programme.title: Black Snow
programme.desc: Gosha is a trucker in northern Yakutia, who supplies his community with food, alongside low quality vodka which contributes to their alcoholism. When his truck breaks down during one of his trips, he finds himself alone in the wilderness.

programme.title: Good Luck Sam
programme.desc: Sam and Stéphane, childhood friends and ski equipment designers, embark on a wild quest to save their struggling business. They hatch a plan to enter Sam into the Winter Olympics, and have him compete under his father’s home country of Algeria.

programme.title: Our Children
programme.desc: A doctor brings a boy to Belgium and raises him as his own. When the boy reaches manhood, he gets married and starts his own family, but he still relies on the doctor, his adoptive father. When trouble strikes his family, dependence turns into domination.

programme.title: Romancing The Jungle
programme.desc: Eva is a rookie journalist keen on investigating sea piracy. When she is really kidnapped by pirates in Thailand, she is forced to fight for her life. With her is a hunky smuggler called Nik, and together, the comedic duo band together to survive.

programme.title: Forever-Forever
programme.desc: In late 90s Kyiv, rebellious Tonia joins a gang, seeking protection and belonging. Amidst the ruins of the post-soviet city, she finds herself tangled up in a secret love triangle and confronting her abusive past.

programme.title: Life Feels Good
programme.desc: The true story of Mateusz, a man suffering from cerebral palsy, who in his early childhood had been diagnosed as a retard with no contact with the outside world. After twenty-five years it turned out that he was a perfectly normal and intelligent person.

programme.title: Traces Of Sandalwood
programme.desc: Adopted and living in Spain for years, a young woman returns to Mumbai to discover her roots, accompanied by a handsome Indian guide whom she romances.

programme.title: The Apple of My Eye
programme.desc: Elise is beautiful, funny, and blind. Theo is a seducer but a loser. They love music. But when they meet in the elevator, it's hate at first sight.

programme.title: Deep In The Wood
programme.desc: During the Krampus festival, little Tommi disappears mysteriously in the woods. He is found 5 years later in a building site on the outskirts of Naples, but his parents and the town locals are suspicious and frightened by his strange behaviour.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Perched Forest
programme.desc: Commissioner Macéna shows Captain Kandinsky a letter from a ten-year-old boy who claims that a monster in his village forest is behind a string of disappearances. Kandinsky begins the investigation when the boy threatens to confront the culprit himself.

programme.title: Red Eagle
programme.desc: A Summit between France, England, Portugal and the Pope is to take place in Spain, under the guise of looking for a solution to the conflict between Spain and Portugal; but the ulterior motive is to attack the Kingdom of Spain.

programme.title: Sweet Squad
programme.desc: In Kalimantan Barat, teenager Rizal faces a daunting choice to become a sugar courier across the Indonesian-Malaysian border to fund his mother's medical bills. With friends Iwan and Ajung, they risk it all for a chance at saving his mother’s life.

programme.title: Europa
programme.desc: Kamal has fled Iraq to try to enter "Fortress Europe". At the Turkish-Bulgarian border, local mercenaries are ruthlessly hunting down migrants. Alone in the forest, Kamal has three days to escape.

programme.desc: With Kassim and Rogayah missing, everyone spiral into worry and guilt, except Muna. Everyone scrambles to find them before Raya. Misunderstandings cleared, emotional apologies unfold, and the families reunite. With Has & Kass successfully saving the community event, the neighbourhood celebrates a joyful Double Riuh Raya, complete with beautiful raya clothes, tightly-woven ketupat nd heartfelt forgiveness.

programme.title: Unexpectedly Yours - EP 8
programme.desc: Kerol bares his feelings to Alani, but she fears he’s only toying with her. Just as she considers giving him a chance, she pulls back, having only recently earned Dato’ Sarah’s trust. Meanwhile, Neesa grows desperate, using Iqi to hold on to Farouk.

programme.title: Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission

programme.title: Pesuvom S4 - EP 9
programme.desc: What is shingles? How different is it from a normal rash? Watch as Dr Uma answers key questions, shares prevention tips, and makes the conversation lively and easy to follow with our Karthik and Shamini and guests Thavanesan and Haleema.

programme.title: Magarantham - EP 20
programme.desc: Suseela reflects on how she first met Vishnu and how he has long been in love with Shangkari. During her visit with Vishnu’s family, she learns of his intention to marry Shangkari and adopt Abhinaya as his own child. Meanwhile, Kelvin and Madhan secretly follow Suseela. Madhan is heartbroken when he sees another man holding her hand. Later that day, Suseela is seen persuading Segar to encourage Shangkari to remarry.

programme.title: Thayangaathey - EP 13
programme.desc: Thayangaathey, is a health documentary-drama, that is centred around 13 unique case studies who suffer from chronic, life-altering diseases. The cases range from poor lifestyle choices, complacency, ignorance to complete unfortunate personals. The intent of the programme is to educate viewers of these illnesses, the symptoms to look out for, the probability of them succumbing to these illnesses, early detection and so on.

programme.title: Paper Rocket - EP 6
programme.desc: Six strangers who belong to diverse age groups and backgrounds embark on a road trip across Tamil Nadu. Each of them wants to fulfil a major wish on their bucket list during the trip.

programme.title: Rusiyo Rusi S4 - EP 10
programme.desc: Kumar travels to Brisbane, a city known for its proximity to fantastic beaches, rainforests and reefs. Watch as he experiences not only Brisbane's bustling city life, but also nature at its finest and has an adrenaline-fueled adventure with helicopters, quad bikes and wild dolphins.

programme.title: Nijangal - EP 45
programme.desc: This drama aims to connect with audience with current and relevant issues that they can identify with. They will be able to relate with the themes and reflect on their own lives.

programme.title: Yaathumaagi - EP 1
programme.desc: Yaathumaagi is the struggle of a woman in a cutthroat corporate world. An unexpected tragedy throws a happy family into turmoil and uncertainties. Shakti, the daughter, picks up the pieces and accepts the challenge of stepping up to lead a family business. Can she overcome the odds stacked against her and uphold the legacy that will bring back stability to the family and business?

programme.desc: Priya, a friendly girl who often falls into trouble, has an admirer, Thomas, though she wants to be a nun. So Thomas takes Deva's help to convince her for himself, but she falls for Deva instead.

programme.title: Forever-Forever
programme.desc: In late 90s Kyiv, rebellious Tonia joins a gang, seeking protection and belonging. Amidst the ruins of the post-soviet city, she finds herself tangled up in a secret love triangle and confronting her abusive past.

programme.title: Our Children
programme.desc: A doctor brings a boy to Belgium and raises him as his own. When the boy reaches manhood, he gets married and starts his own family, but he still relies on the doctor, his adoptive father. When trouble strikes his family, dependence turns into domination.

programme.title: Traces Of Sandalwood
programme.desc: Adopted and living in Spain for years, a young woman returns to Mumbai to discover her roots, accompanied by a handsome Indian guide whom she romances.

programme.title: Deep In The Wood
programme.desc: During the Krampus festival, little Tommi disappears mysteriously in the woods. He is found 5 years later in a building site on the outskirts of Naples, but his parents and the town locals are suspicious and frightened by his strange behaviour.

programme.title: To My Beloved
programme.desc: Fernando is a good man who takes care of his only child, Daniel. Following the death of his wife Ana, every night Fernando recalls their love as he sorts out his beloved dead spouse’s belongings. One day he finds a VHS tape that will change everything.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Perched Forest
programme.desc: Commissioner Macéna shows Captain Kandinsky a letter from a ten-year-old boy who claims that a monster in his village forest is behind a string of disappearances. Kandinsky begins the investigation when the boy threatens to confront the culprit himself.

programme.title: Passed by Censor
programme.desc: In an Istanbul prison, Zakir is tasked with reading and censoring the letters inmates receive. Tasked with a writing assignment for his night class, Zakir uses a photograph of an inmate's wife for inspiration, but fantasy soon morphs into delusion.

programme.title: Red Eagle
programme.desc: A Summit between France, England, Portugal and the Pope is to take place in Spain, under the guise of looking for a solution to the conflict between Spain and Portugal; but the ulterior motive is to attack the Kingdom of Spain.

programme.title: The Vanishing Soldier
programme.desc: An 18-year-old Israeli soldier flees the Gaza battlefield and heads back to his girlfriend in Tel Aviv only to discover that the military elite is convinced he was kidnapped in the fog of war.

programme.title: Europa
programme.desc: Kamal has fled Iraq to try to enter "Fortress Europe". At the Turkish-Bulgarian border, local mercenaries are ruthlessly hunting down migrants. Alone in the forest, Kamal has three days to escape.

programme.title: Hard Shell, Soft Shell
programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: You Are Not Alone
programme.desc: When Eva returns to her house on the day of her divorce, she finds a bouquet of red roses outside the door. Attached is the note: "You are not alone." The sender is anonymous.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Temptation of Evil
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky is called upon to investigate the death of a dentist whose body was found charred. Kandinsky doubts the official verdict of suicide when he discovers two other victims whose bodies were also found charred in the same region.

programme.title: Breathing Underwater
programme.desc: When Emma has to leave her picture-perfect life for a women's shelter, covered in bruises and unexpectedly pregnant, her unlikely friendship with a ragtag group of women pushes them all into a fight to take back their power.
